# VueUse

> VueUse is a collection of essential Vue Composition Utilities. It provides over 200+ functions for Vue 3 and Vue 2, covering browser, state, sensor, animation, and many other categories.

## Quick Links

- [Documentation](https://vueuse.org): Full documentation with interactive demos
- [GitHub](https://github.com/vueuse/vueuse): Source code and contribution guide
- [Functions List](https://vueuse.org/functions): Complete list of all available functions

## Categories

- **Browser**: `useLocalStorage`, `useSessionStorage`, `useEventListener`, `useMediaQuery`, etc.
- **State**: `useStorage`, `useCounter`, `useOffsetPagination`, etc.
- **Sensors**: `useMouse`, `useWindowSize`, `useScroll`, `useIntersectionObserver`, etc.
- **Animation**: `useTransition`, `useInterval`, `useTimeout`, etc.
- **Network**: `useFetch`, `useAxios`, `useWebSocket`, etc.
- **Utilities**: `useToggle`, `useClipboard`, `useDebounceFn`, `useThrottleFn`, etc.

## Usage

```ts
import { useLocalStorage, useMouse, usePreferredDark } from '@vueuse/core'

const { x, y } = useMouse()
const isDark = usePreferredDark()
const store = useLocalStorage('my-key', 'default-value')
```

## Installation

```bash
npm install @vueuse/core
# or
yarn add @vueuse/core
# or
pnpm add @vueuse/core
```

## Optional Add-ons

- `@vueuse/router` - Vue Router integrations
- `@vueuse/firebase` - Firebase integrations
- `@vueuse/rxjs` - RxJS integrations
- `@vueuse/integrations` - Third-party library integrations

## Contributing

See [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/vueuse/vueuse/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
